deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Military buyer. Lien resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Closed Apr 27, 2026.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Thank you note to Chelsey Bongiovi. Post-close follow-up.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo about lien holder Fernando Castillo

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. Steve cleared property. No current offer. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps. When next offer comes, lead with net after close.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Agent and buyer outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. New prospect interested in subdividing reached out.
Clearing finished. Photos posted to social. Drone footage flagged as priority. First offer dead.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Cleanup active. Electrician and plumber scheduled. Utilities confirmed: Medina Electric Coop (866-632-3532) and EMCSUD (830-709-3879). Listing agreement needed to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Get transformer number tomorrow. Submit Medina Electric application. Finalize utility setup with EMCSUD callback. Send listing agreement to bank.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut for electrician and plumber. Email sent to Kelly with utility info.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). New VA buyer lead identified.
Work officially starting. Dumpsters dropped by San Antonio Remodelers.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater $93K-$143K. Double-carrying apartment rent plus $2,843.85 mortgage. Vacant 6 months. 208 DOM. Payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K. Three paths identified.
deals.next: Call Matt and Chandler with pricing options. Recommend strategic drop to $518,999 or pursue short sale path. Must choose direction.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Three options presented. Payoff verified at $489,501.12 plus per diem.
Stopped by property. Lawn care quotes being gathered.
Full market analysis completed. 717 Jack Nicklaus listed at $519K is direct competitor.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Motivated seller moving to NC second week of June. Insurance adjuster roof claim moving forward. First showing feedback: cultural concern about direction. Furniture negotiable.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Confirm roof replacement decision with adjuster. Follow up on cultural/feng shui concern addressed to buyer.

logs.m: MLS live. First showing feedback received. Roof adjuster visited May 11. Neighborhood canvassed.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG.
Listing consultation with Jose, Katy, and Isaac. CMA recommended $259,900.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Development potential. Title defect flagged: Deed #20100079485 has incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. Isaac interested in mobile home development concept (~$150K offer if project moves).
deals.next: Pull listing agreement to check signatures. Call sisters to confirm listing extension. Connect Isaac and Josh LT on development partnership.

logs.m: Isaac interested in 10-acre mobile home development. Josh LT potential partner.
Title defect confirmed. Jennifer Ball coordinated with attorney Van Hutchins. Correction Deed in progress.
Sisters excited about Isaac development angle. Mobile home concept with veteran units discussed.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. Connected with Zach Schaphorst (MTG Broker) and Erik Williams (Success Lending). Pre-approval status unknown.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction search platform. Identify no-HOA builders. Schedule model home visits.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com search platform. New construction pivot underway.
Rental selling. Assessed 916 Marriott - pass due to foundation and roof issues. New construction strategy introduced.

deals.title: Colton & Abby Brown
deals.notes: Prior clients. Divorce in progress. Moore TX home purchased with VA renovation loan. Need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for contractor work.
deals.next: Reach out to Colton. Confirm listing timeline. Get property details. Offer 181 CR 7751 contractor opportunity.

logs.m: Identified as potential contractor for 181 CR 7751 and seller lead opportunity.

deals.title: Milagros Stringer
deals.notes: New construction buyer. Budget $50K down targeting ~$1,000/month payment. Not locked to Grace Gardens. MI Homes option under review. Buyer rep signed May 7.
deals.next: Follow up on Milagros signature status. Confirm MI Homes interest. Pull inventory across all builders. Schedule model home visits.

logs.m: Need to follow up with Milagros. Ask Brandon about timeline and interest level.
MI Homes option found. Intro email sent. Buyer rep signature packet sent.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft 3BR/2BA new construction 2025 Lennar home in Grace Gardens. Rental comps $1,595/month. HOA $300 quarterly. Owner financing to rent 2 years then occupy. Listing agreement MUST go out today.
deals.next: Send Skyslope listing agreement packet to Jimbo. Finalize rental price and terms. Schedule professional photos. List on Zillow, HAR, and rental platforms.

logs.m: Listing agreement reviewed. 12 questions sent to Jimbo. Recommendation $1,595/month confirmed.
CMA completed. Email sent with market analysis and pricing options.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor around the corner from 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurts area. Call Kurt to clarify situation and determine if buyer or seller.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection from Little Red House garden group. Grief to healing to plants story. Content collaboration potential with permission.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Nurture relationship.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Investor with buy box pending. Mobile home development interest on Borregas property (~$150K offer). Potential partner with Josh LT.
leads.next: Full intake call for buy box details. Connect Isaac and Josh LT on development partnership.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St. Plans to sell soon. Currently with another realtor. 90% complete with construction challenges.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Stay connected through garden community.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet about property plans.
leads.next: Get son name and contact info from Miss Pat. Reach out as neighbor first. Assess if selling, keeping, or renting.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 job site May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military. Recently moved from Ohio. Renting now. Looking to purchase San Antonio area home.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work. Unique situation mentioned May 11.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property type. Understand financing and work scope.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: Green Bliss rental listing (8527) and mothers new construction purchase (Milagros Stringer).
leads.next: Confirm Green Bliss listing details with Brandon. Prioritize Milagros buyer rep signature. Schedule Grace Gardens visit with both.

priorities.title: 8527 Green Bliss Rental - Listing Agreement
priorities.sub: Send Skyslope packet to Jimbo TODAY
priorities.notes: Listing agreement fully reviewed. 12 questions sent to Jimbo for input. Recommendation: $1,595/month, 12-month lease, full month co-op. Awaiting responses to finalize and submit.

followUps.text: Get Jimbo signature on rental agreement

priorities.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Pricing Decision Call
priorities.sub: Call Matt and Chandler with three options
priorities.notes: Path A: Short sale at $370K-$385K. Path B: VA loan assumption by investor. Path C: Price reduction to $399K-$420K plus sellers bring cash. Email sent May 14 with full analysis. Must have conversation ASAP.

followUps.text: Call Matt and Chandler - present three paths
Get seller buy-in on direction choice
Execute chosen path (short sale packet, investor intro, or price adjustment)

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Utilities & Listing Agreement
priorities.sub: Get transformer number. Finalize utility setup. Send to bank.
priorities.notes: Tomorrow: grab transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. EMCSUD callback expected in morning. Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham (ray.stidham@prioritybank.com).

followUps.text: Get transformer # from site visit tomorrow
Submit Medina Electric application at medinaec.org
Confirm water service with EMCSUD callback
Send listing agreement to Priority Bank decision makers

priorities.notes: First showing feedback received May 14 (cultural concern addressed). Insurance adjuster roof claim moving forward. Furniture negotiable with sellers. Need to track roof decision and second showing interest.

Follow up if offer comes in from showing agent MK or others
